title: nf-core/drop pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

RNA_ID.errorMessage: RNA ID must be provided and cannot contain spaces
RNA_ID.description: Unique identifier for the RNA sample. Must not contain spaces.

RNA_BAM_FILE.errorMessage: The RNA BAM file has to exist, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.bam'
RNA_BAM_FILE.description: Path to the RNA BAM file. Must exist and cannot contain spaces.

RNA_BAI_FILE.errorMessage: The RNA BAM index file has to exist, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.bam.bai'
RNA_BAI_FILE.description: Path to the RNA BAM index file. Must exist and cannot contain spaces.

DNA_ID.errorMessage: DNA ID must be provided and cannot contain spaces
DNA_ID.description: Unique identifier for the DNA sample. Must not contain spaces.

DNA_VCF_FILE.errorMessage: The DNA VCF file has to exist, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.vcf.gz'
DNA_VCF_FILE.description: Path to the DNA VCF file. Must exist and cannot contain spaces.

DNA_TBI_FILE.errorMessage: The DNA VCF index file has to exist, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.vcf.gz.tbi'
DNA_TBI_FILE.description: Path to the DNA VCF index file. Must exist and cannot contain spaces.

DROP_GROUP.errorMessage: DROP group must be provided and cannot contain spaces
DROP_GROUP.description: A comma-separated list of groups this sample belongs to. Must not contain spaces.

PAIRED_END.description: Indicates if the input is paired-end or single-end. Default is true (paired-end).

COUNT_OVERLAPS.description: Indicates if overlaps should be counted. Default is true.

HPO_TERMS.description: Comma-separated list of HPO terms associated with the sample

GENE_COUNTS_FILE.errorMessage: The gene counts file has to exist, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.tsv.gz'
GENE_COUNTS_FILE.description: Path to the gene counts file. Must exist and cannot contain spaces.

GENE_ANNOTATION.description: Gene annotation version to use for this sample. All available versions will be used if this field is empty.

SPLICE_COUNTS_DIR.errorMessage: The splice counts directory has to exist and cannot contain spaces
SPLICE_COUNTS_DIR.description: Path to the splice counts directory. Must exist and cannot contain spaces.

TISSUE.description: The tissue type of the sample

DISEASE.description: The disease type of the sample
